name: Chemical Quantity and Storage Conditions Entry
description:
The Environmental Engineer at Arctic Fresh Cold Storage needs to complete the annual EPCRA Section 312 (Tier II) report for their industrial refrigeration system. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit 2025 application (already open), import the baseline facility data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\arctic_fresh_baseline.t2s. If the file is unavailable, create a new facility named 'Arctic Fresh Cold Storage' and add 'Ammonia (anhydrous)' (CAS 7664-41-7). Navigate to the Anhydrous Ammonia chemical entry and enter the missing details: 

1. Maximum Daily Amount: Range Code 05 (10,000 - 99,999 lbs), Exact Amount: 45000 lbs
2. Average Daily Amount: Range Code 05 (10,000 - 99,999 lbs), Exact Amount: 32000 lbs
3. Days On-Site: 365
4. Add Storage Entry 1: Type = 'Tank inside building', Pressure = 'Greater than ambient pressure', Temperature = 'Less than ambient temperature but not cryogenic'
5. Add Storage Entry 2: Type = 'Cylinder', Pressure = 'Greater than ambient pressure', Temperature = 'Ambient temperature'

After entering all quantities and storage configurations, save and export the submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\arctic_fresh_2024.t2s.
